---
format:
  html:
    toc: false
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureFileRegexMatches:
        - ["Format Specific Test Project"]
        - ["<nav[^>]*id=\"TOC\"", "toc-title"]
---

This document disables TOC via format.html.toc: false,
overriding the project's format.html.toc: true.

## Section One

Content here.

## Section Two

More content.
